zh.Wantage, Vale of the White Horse distric: 英國英格蘭波克夏望塔
zh.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Childre: 英國英格蘭波克夏也維勒聖 瑪麗 馮 維金
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Childrey於1350年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏時，他的父親Sir Edmund Childrey25歲，母親Lucy Frethorne23歲。他於1374年與Elizabeth De Clare在英國英格蘭波克夏望塔結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年10月30日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏也維勒聖 瑪麗 馮 維金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Childrey于1350年出生在英国英格兰波克夏时，他的父亲Sir Edmund Childrey25岁，母亲Lucy Frethorne23岁。他于1374年与Elizabeth De Clare在英国英格兰波克夏望塔结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年10月30日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏也維勒聖 瑪麗 馮 維金。

nameMeanings.name: Childrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Childrey in Oxfordshire, which is named for Childrey Brook. This is probably ‘stream (Old English rīth) of Cilla (masculine) or Cille (feminine)’, but the first element could alternatively be Old English cille ‘spring’. The surname has died out in England.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Childrey was born in 1350, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edmund Childrey, was 25 and his mother, Lucy Frethorne, was 23. He married Elizabeth De Clare in 1374, in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 30 October 1407, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Childrey est né en 1350, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund Childrey, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lucy Frethorne, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Clare en 1374, à Wantage, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1407, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Childre: St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Childrey 1350 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Childrey 25 und seine Mutter Lucy Frethorne 23. Er hat 1374 in Wantage, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth De Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1407 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childrey è nato il nel 1350 nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Childrey, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Frethorne, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Clare nel 1374, nel Wantage, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 ottobre 1407, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Childreyが1350年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Childreyは25歳，母Lucy Frethorneは23歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアワンタッジでElizabeth De Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年10月30日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチエベリースト マリー ス バージンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Childre: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치벨리 스트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Childrey(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Childrey(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Frethorne(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 완타지에서 Elizabeth De Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 10월 30일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치벨리 스트 메리 테 버긴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Childrey nasceu em 1350, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edmund Childrey, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Frethorne, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Clare em 1374, em Wantage, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1407, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of Saint Mary the Virgin, Childre: ст мэри т виргин, чиивели, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Childrey родился в 1350 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Childrey было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Frethorne, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Clare в 1374 г. в местности вантадж, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 октября 1407 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин, чиивели, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
